title: serpillaria
intro: Serpillaria, also known as Euphrasia or eyebright, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating eye infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of serpillaria include its ability to reduce eye pressure, improve vision, and alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of serpillaria include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
